title: StackFramePayload
description: Represents a single frame in an exception's stack trace.

file.description: The file path where the code is located.

lineNumber.description: The line number in the file where the frame originates.

columnNumber.description: The column number in the file.

inProject.description: Whether this frame originates from the project's own code, as opposed to a library or framework.

code.description: A map of line numbers to source code lines surrounding the error location.
